headline: Small Caps Near Record Highs, Robinhood Rallies 12%: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks traded higher by midday Wednesday, with semiconductor equipment names and small caps leading the tape, as investors held their fire ahead of Kevin Warsh‘s first interest-rate decision as Federal Reserve chair, due at 2 p.m. ET.

headline: Kurv Launches the XSHP ETF, Designed to Provide SpaceX Exposure With Monthly Income Potential
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 17, 2026--Kurv Investment Management, an asset manager bringing an institutional approach to active ETFs, today announced the launch of the Kurv SpaceX Enhanced Income ETF (CBOE BZX: XSHP).

headline: Glass House Brands Announces its Deconsolidation of its Dual-Use Business and its Application for Uplisting of Shares to NYSE
summary: LONG BEACH, Calif. and TORONTO, June 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Glass House Brands Inc. ("Glass House" or the “Company”) (CBOE CA: GLAS.A.U) (OTCQX: GLASF) today announced that it has applied to list its subordinate voting shares on the New York Stock Exchange (“NYSE”). headline: Nasdaq Futures Climb as Chip Stocks Rebound Ahead of First Fed Decision Under Warsh
summary: June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.54% this morning, signaling a rebound from yesterday’s selloff, while investors await the first Federal Reserve rate decision under Kevin Warsh.
